## devbox restart

Restart compose services

### Synopsis

Restart running compose services.

When service names are provided, only those services are restarted.

```
devbox restart [services...] [flags]
```

### Examples

```
  devbox restart
  devbox restart app-main
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help   help for restart
```

### Options inherited from parent commands

```
  -c, --config string   path to devbox.yml (default "devbox.yml")
```
